# Full Traefik logs since it restarted (no grep filter)
docker compose -f /opt/proxy/docker-compose.yml logs traefik --since=30m --tail=50

# Check what's in the acme.json right now
docker run --rm -v proxy_letsencrypt:/data alpine cat /data/acme.json

# Check the ACME email is set in the proxy .env
cat /opt/proxy/.env

  "letsencrypt": {
